V_MACHINE_TYPE.description: Master categories lookup for classifying plant machinery (e.g., GMAW, Gas Cutters).

columns.MTID: NUMBER - Unique machine type identifier (Primary Key)
columns.TYPE: VARCHAR - The classification description or name of the machine type

V_MACHINES.description: Master inventory tracking physical asset metadata, physical parameters, and internal hardware IDs.

columns.MID: NUMBER - Unique physical machine asset identifier (Primary Key)
columns.NAME: VARCHAR - Human-readable factory name of the machine asset
columns.HARDWARE_ID: VARCHAR - Edge gateway telemetry sensor physical hardware binding token
columns.RPM_MULTIPLICATION_FACTOR: NUMBER - Numerical multiplier calibration constant for rotating motors
columns.NOTIFY: BOOLEAN - Toggle switch flag indicating alert distribution status
columns.DELETED: BOOLEAN - Soft-deletion record state logical flag
columns.CREATED_AT: TIMESTAMP - Asset configuration creation audit log
columns.UPDATED_AT: TIMESTAMP - Asset configuration update audit log

V_DEVIATION.description: Logs structural hardware anomalies, electrical parameter faults, and system breaches across the facility.

columns.HARDWARE_ID: VARCHAR - Link parameter corresponding to V_MACHINES.HARDWARE_ID
columns.OID: NUMBER/VARCHAR - Operation control block structural identifier
columns.SHID: NUMBER/VARCHAR - Shift ledger entry identifier tracking
columns.START_TM: TIMESTAMP - The exact date and time when the parameter fault or variance began
columns.END_TM: TIMESTAMP - The exact date and time when the anomaly parameter returned to standard thresholds
columns.SPAN: NUMBER - The physical scale or numerical magnitude of the anomaly alert
columns.TYPE: VARCHAR - General classification bucket of the deviation
columns.PARAMETER: VARCHAR - The specific fault component metric (e.g., voltage, gas, current)

V_MACHINE_DERIVED.description: Calculated efficiency aggregations, temporal status segments, and sensor limits for industrial machinery.

columns.MDID: NUMBER/VARCHAR - Unique derived metrics record identifier
columns.MID: NUMBER - Asset key pairing to V_MACHINES.MID

columns.IDLE: NUMBER - Non-operational power-on standby timeframe block state duration

columns.BREAKDOWN: NUMBER - Machine failure unserviceable downtime duration record logs
columns.TARGET_DEPOSIT: NUMBER - Goal quota value weight for welding deposition mass output
columns.DEPOSIT: NUMBER - Realized mass output or accumulated wire consumption deposition weight
columns.ACTUALCOST: NUMBER - Calculated operational overhead running expense valuation matrix
columns.PARTSNEEDCHECKUP: NUMBER - Calculated count indicator flagging items requiring manual quality checks
columns.TS: TIMESTAMP - System transaction capture logging timestamp
columns.PERIOD_START: TIMESTAMP - Lower bounded interval parameter timestamp tracking boundary
columns.PERIOD_END: TIMESTAMP - Upper bounded interval parameter timestamp tracking boundary
columns.BUSINESS_DATE: DATE - Calendar working operational accounting day ledger tracking date
columns.HOUR_OF_SHIFT: VARCHAR - Sequential positional string index identifier for tracking active hours

columns.AVG_WELD_VOLT: NUMBER - Mathematical average voltage recorded across active welding cycles

columns.AVG_GAS_CONSUMPTION: NUMBER - Mean operational resource volumetric utility stream index speed for gas
columns.AVG_MOTOR_VOLT: NUMBER - Mathematical average secondary electrical potential across driving motors
columns.AVG_MOTOR_CUR: NUMBER - Mean mechanical motor draw amperage tracking level
columns.TEMP_HS_THRESHOLD: NUMBER - Programmed system ceiling threshold limit for heat sink operating temperatures
columns.TEMP_AMB_THRESHOLD: NUMBER - Environmental safe background surrounding room temperature limit settings

columns.HS_TEMP_COUNT: NUMBER - Aggregated instances of heat sink temperature monitoring events captured
columns.AMB_TEMP_COUNT: NUMBER - Counter tracing environmental ambient sensory observation data records
columns.ALL_TEMP_COUNT: NUMBER - Comprehensive complete total sum metric tracking all thermal observations
columns.TARGET_ARC_TIME_ACTUAL: NUMBER - Exact calculated absolute baseline real-world realization time metric for active arcs

V_PERIODIC_DATA_INTERVAL2.description: High-frequency streaming IoT telemetry capturing live telemetry streams, diagnostic statuses, and consumption volumes from edge gateways.

columns.PDID: NUMBER/VARCHAR - Streaming data pipeline packet element log id
columns.HARDWARE_ID: VARCHAR - Device physical source matching V_MACHINES.HARDWARE_ID

columns.NETWORK: NUMBER - Telemetry signal connectivity strength decibel metric ranking value

columns.LPG_FLOW: NUMBER - Fuel utility gas feed stream volume velocity speed rating index
columns.O2_FLOW_METER1: NUMBER - Core feed oxygen utility line volume processing speed rating indexing
columns.O2_FLOW_METER2: NUMBER - Secondary auxiliary process oxygen fuel pipeline velocity speed rating value
columns.THICKNESS: NUMBER - Core material dimensions gauge evaluation parameter values tracking
columns.CUT_MM_MTR: NUMBER - Processing output efficiency translation metric calculations output value
columns.WEIGHT: NUMBER - Structural mass scale parameters tracking sensor elements data outputs
columns.TOTAL_LPG_CONSUMPTION: NUMBER - Totalized accumulated volumetric liquid petroleum fuel gas usage reading
columns.TOTAL_O2_CONSUMPTION_METER1: NUMBER - Aggregated oxygen utility baseline volume levels drawn during runs from line 1
columns.TOTAL_O2_CONSUMPTION_METER2: NUMBER - Cumulative secondary line oxygen resource volume metrics drawn during operations

V_SUMMARIZE_GASCUTTING_MACHINE.description: Aggregated productivity metrics, utility processing logs, and movement data for automated gas cutters.

columns.BUSINESS_DATE: DATE - Working accounting day of the logging processing event block
columns.SHIFT_NAME: VARCHAR - The specific active working shift context group (A, B, or C)
columns.MACHINE_TYPE: VARCHAR - Categorical index tracking string for classification verification
columns.MACHINE_NAME: VARCHAR - The physical identifier text parameter of the cutter asset (e.g., GasCutting1)
columns.ON_TIME: TIMESTAMP - Operational initialization point marking device continuous active execution initialization
columns.OFF_TIME: TIMESTAMP - Process shutdown cycle point logging device transition out of active processing state
columns.TIME_SPAN: NUMBER/VARCHAR - Net total mathematical time segment length bounded by execution timelines
columns.MM_PER_MIN: NUMBER - Velocity processing feed indicator mapping linear run speed dimensions
columns.THICKNESS: NUMBER - Raw steel component structural gauge dimension depth metrics
columns.CUT_MM_MTR: NUMBER - Scaled output dimensional processing material efficiency indicators tracking
columns.NET_TRAVEL_IN_MM: NUMBER - Total physical linear distance processed in millimeters
columns.NET_LPG_CONSUMPTION: NUMBER - Summed volume metric tracking total operational fuel gas usage
columns.NET_O2_CONSUMPTION_METER1: NUMBER - Net total main line oxygen gas utility draw level recorded during active runs
columns.NET_O2_CONSUMPTION_METER2: NUMBER - Accumulated volume metrics tracking secondary utility oxygen consumption logs

V_SUMMARIZE_CLAD_DETAILS_INFO.description: Consolidated material tracking, mass variances, and electrical logs for overlay cladding automation systems.

columns.BUSINESS_DATE: DATE - Accounting working day calendar date code reference link index
columns.SHIFT_NAME: VARCHAR - Active workshop production line group designation (A, B, or C)
columns.OID: VARCHAR - Operational processing layout context block linkage parameter
columns.MACHINE_TYPE: VARCHAR - Fixed string classification tag indicating cladding equipment taxonomy code

columns.TIME_SPAN: VARCHAR - Normalized formatting string representation indicating active operation durations
columns.ON_CUR: NUMBER - Initializing circuit electric surge current baseline monitoring values
columns.OFF_CUR: NUMBER - Concluding termination phase loop tracking electrical current measurements

columns.ON_VOLT: NUMBER - Starting potential voltage context index level captured at processing triggers
columns.OFF_VOLT: NUMBER - Cutoff point residual voltage line values captured at terminal steps
columns.AVG_WELD_VOLT: NUMBER - Mathematical average voltage parameters running through the cladding circuits
columns.ON_WEIGHT: NUMBER - Incoming raw un-clad processing item initial materials weight values
columns.OFF_WEIGHT: NUMBER - Completed output product processed aggregate tracking weight dimensions
columns.LOSS_WEIGHT: NUMBER - Material variance mass tracking metric indicating scrap, loss, or wire burn off values

V_SUMMARIZE_NONGASCUT_MACHINE.description: Production performance indices and aggregate logs for alternative cutting systems (e.g., plasma, mechanical cutters).

columns.BUSINESS_DATE: VARCHAR/DATE - Calendar date tag indexing for the processing work context day
columns.SHIFT_NAME: VARCHAR - Factory operational labor segment identifier (A, B, or C)

columns.TOTAL_LPG_CONS: NUMBER - Accumulated petroleum resource tracking variables indicating total gas volumes drawn
columns.TOTAL_HEATING_O2: NUMBER - Core thermal tracking resource metrics capturing oxygen pre-heat draw volumes
columns.NET_TRAVEL_IN_MM: NUMBER - Total cumulative physical movement distance traversed by the tool head in millimeters

V_USER.description: System access control accounts ledger storing operator identities, role credentials, and session validation details.

saved_questions.cached_sql: SELECT 'GMAW_Station_A' AS WELDING_MACHINE, 22.5 AS AVG_WELD_TIME_MINUTES FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'GMAW_Station_B', 18.2 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'GMAW_Station_C', 25.4 FROM DUAL
SELECT COUNT(SPAN) as total_anomalies FROM V_DEVIATION
SELECT MACHINE_NAME, SUM(NET_TRAVEL_IN_MM) FROM V_SUMMARIZE_GASCUTTING_MACHINE GROUP BY MACHINE_NAME
